narrative_beat: Fieis em carmesim e ocre diante de idolo luminoso

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid medieval crowd of worshippers kneeling in crimson ochre and blue robes before elevated glowing golden idol with supernatural light in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the elevated glowing golden idol with supernatural light
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated empty modern public square with security cameras on building walls in background
props: medieval crowd in crimson ochre blue robes

composition.foreground: crowd and idol in vivid crimson ochre

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, gold saturation, divine halation

mood.emotion: ancient pattern repeating in modern context

symbolism.primary: worshipping the image — the eternal human failure
symbolism.secondary: security cameras as modern idols watching back

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
